title: Position card: WIN/LOSE direction, TP/SL/Size boxes, command bar win rate
objective: Three UI improvements to position cards and the command bar: (1) Replace the YES/NO pill with WIN/LOSE so the user can immediately see which team they're backing without knowing contract semantics. (2) Add TP, SL, and Position Size stat boxes to position cards — the API already returns these fields (tp_price, sl_price, qty, entry_px) but they're not displayed. (3) Add win rate to the command bar so it's always visible on mobile.

deliverables.label: Change action pill from YES/NO to WIN/LOSE in buildUnifiedPositionCards()
deliverables.where: buildUnifiedPositionCards() — the line that sets aLabel (currently 'YES' or 'NO')

deliverables.label: Add TP, SL, Size stat boxes to position cards
deliverables.where: buildUnifiedPositionCards() — the .pos-stats block with Entry/Current/Confidence boxes
deliverables.change:
After the existing 3 stat boxes (Entry, Current, Confidence), add 3 more: const sizeUsd = (r.qty != null && r.entry_px != null) ? fmtUsd(r.qty * r.entry_px) : (r.shadow_position_size_usd ? fmtUsd(r.shadow_position_size_usd) : '—'); Add to the stat boxes template:
TP
${fmtPx(r.tp_price)}
SL
${fmtPx(r.sl_price)}
Size
${sizeUsd}
The .pos-stats CSS grid already uses repeat(3, 1fr) — adding 3 more boxes creates a clean 2-row layout automatically. No CSS changes needed.

deliverables.label: Add win rate to command bar
deliverables.where: Command bar HTML — near the cmdbar-stat spans for Open and P&L

acceptance_criteria: Position card action pill shows 'WIN' for BUY_YES trades and 'LOSE' for BUY_NO trades
Position cards show 6 stat boxes: Entry, Current, Confidence (row 1), TP, SL, Size (row 2)
TP and SL values are displayed as decimal prices (e.g. 0.76, 0.33)
Size shows dollar amount (e.g. $50.00) computed from qty * entry_px
Command bar shows W%: XX% (or W%: — if no data)
Win rate in command bar updates when /api/state returns r25.win_rate
verification: Open dashboard on mobile or narrow browser window
Any open position card: action pill says WIN or LOSE (not YES/NO)
Any open position card: 6 stat boxes visible — TP and SL show decimal prices, Size shows $
Command bar top of screen: W%: shown (may be — if no trades yet)
Check browser console: no JS errors
